Schedule & Pricing

Weekly Schedule

Please arrive 10 minutes early to settle in.

Batch Timings Format
Morning Batch 6:30 – 7:30 AM
7:30 – 8:30 AM
8:30 – 9:30 AM
9:30 – 10:30 AM		 Group Sessions
Evening Batch 5:00 – 6:00 PM [ Online Batch ]
6:00 – 7:00 PM		 Group Sessions

*Schedule is subject to change. Private sessions available by appointment.
